# claude-marketplace

liangzr's public Claude Code plugin marketplace.

## Install

```
/plugin marketplace add liangzr/claude-marketplace
/plugin install <plugin>@claude-marketplace
```

## ⚠️ Do not edit this repo directly

`marketplace.json` is **auto-generated** from [`claude-marketplace-manager`](https://github.com/liangzr/claude-marketplace-manager)'s `plugins.yaml`. Manual edits here will be overwritten on the next sync. To add/remove/update a plugin, change `plugins.yaml` in the manager repo.
